microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive $14M+ business impact across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and **self-service scheduling** capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation standard.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** requiring precise stakeholder coordination across legal, engineering, and ops.
Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows to reduce **planning cycle time by 39%** and increase drill capacity by 21%, scaling team leverage without adding headcount.

Tracked and analyzed program execution data across 45+ annual drills to surface systemic gaps, inform strategic roadmap priorities, and report program effectiveness to senior leadership on a quarterly basis.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting demos and training that drove utilization across **14 key teams** and saved 37 engineering hours monthly by standardizing onboarding documentation and intake processes.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ stakeholder interviews** with Azure service teams, synthesizing findings into a prioritized feature gap analysis presented to senior PMs.

Improved data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool, reducing average lookup time by 83% across internal engineering teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams through structured stakeholder coordination.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building a roadmap to automate the highest-impact paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and **prioritize high-impact initiatives** by engineering a Power BI dashboard tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, improving visibility into program effectiveness and resource allocation.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating stakeholder sign-off across IT, Ops, and Engineering.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process by maintaining a clearly prioritized backlog aligned to program milestones.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating deployment cycles by 25%** and reducing manual coordination overhead across release stakeholders.

Maintained accurate program documentation including dependency maps, stakeholder communications, and milestone tracking to ensure compliance with internal governance standards and provide audit-ready records throughout the migration.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing end-to-end scoping and invoicing workflows for 200+ monthly proposals through a redesigned CRM process that improved intake accuracy and reduced turnaround time.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy that included website optimization, Google profile management, and targeted campaign tracking.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying margin leaks and delivering a data-driven recommendation framework to guide future estimating.

Data & Analytics: Power BI, SQL, Python, Trend analysis, Program effectiveness reporting

Technical: Azure, CI/CD, APIs, Distributed systems, YAML, Data pipelines

'Stakeholder coordination' and 'cross-functional alignment' used in amazon_robotics bullet#1 and microsoft_2022 bullet#1 — mirrors JD's 'coordinate with internal stakeholders' requirement.
'Accurate documentation' and 'audit-ready records' used in amazon_robotics bullet#4 — mirrors JD's 'maintain accurate, confidential, and comprehensive case documentation' language.
'Intake process' used in amazon_robotics bullet#2 and pro_painters bullet#1 — mirrors JD's 'intake interviews' and structured process framing.
